category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a command-line editor for HCL; official GitHub README describes HCL command-line editing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hcledit.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available project documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the same GitHub project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/minamijoyo/hcledit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies command-line HCL editing; source_facts.executables lists hcledit.
